# Topline Plumbing

Topline Plumbing is a trusted family-owned plumbing company in Redding, California, established in 2007 by Joe and Cindy Torculas. We specialize in water heater repair, tankless water heater installation, professional drain cleaning, and 24/7 emergency plumbing services.

## Contact Information
- Phone: 530-768-9446
- Email: Toplineplumbingredding@gmail.com
- Website: https://toplineplumbing530.com

## Service Areas
We proudly serve Shasta County, including the following local communities:
- Redding, CA
- Shasta Lake, CA (near Shasta Dam and Shasta Lake Caverns)
- Anderson, CA (near Anderson River Park)
- Palo Cedro, CA
- Bella Vista, CA

## Core Services
1. Water Heater Service ($127): Routine checks, sediment flushing, and repairs for failing tanks.
2. Water Heater Installation (Starting at $1,000): Traditional tank replacements and high-efficiency tankless, on-demand systems. Fast, same-day installations available.
3. Drain Cleaning ($130 flat rate): Professional clearing of tough clogs using mechanical augers and hydro-jetting. No damaging chemicals used.
4. 24/7 Emergency Plumbing: Rapid response for burst pipes, sewage backup, gas line leaks, and water heater flooding.

## Key Facts
- We have successfully replaced over 2,847 water heaters across Northern California.
- We offer 24/7 emergency services with NO after-hours premium.
- We provide flat-rate, upfront pricing so customers know costs before work begins.
- We are Fully Licensed, Bonded, & Insured.

## Our Philosophy
We are a family-owned business, not a corporation. We prioritize honesty over upselling, punctuality, quality workmanship, and treating our local community with respect. We currently offer free water heater safety inspections to help homeowners avoid costly flood damage from aging tanks.
